sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76349" key="o)yodei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψο-δεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δέω Β</etym>) <sense id="n76349.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of food</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
